---
name: Bug report
about: A skill misbehaves, fails to load, or gives wrong guidance
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Which skill?**
<!-- e.g. jtbd-discovery, or "install.sh" / "repo tooling" -->

**What happened?**
<!-- What did you ask for, what did the skill do, what did you expect instead? -->

**How did you install?**
<!-- install.sh (project / --user / --link / --dest), plugin marketplace, or manual copy -->

**Environment**
<!-- Agent + version, e.g. Claude Code 2.x on macOS. Run `claude --version`. -->

**Did the repo checks pass?**
<!-- If you can: run ./scripts/lint-skills.sh and ./scripts/check-links.sh and paste failures -->
